latest.title: Magnets make invisible fields visible

latest.title: Cats paw trees for more than scratching
latest.script_key: they re not just scratching watch the pads press hard those grooves aren t nails they re scent glands every swipe plants their mark that s why strays circle trees before dusk they re leaving a map would you notice if you walked by one today

latest.title: Owls fly silently because feathers break sound
latest.script_key: owls can make a hunt almost silent watch the wing edge because owl feathers have soft fringes that break up noisy airflow that quiet flight helps them hear prey and arrive without warning the silence is built into the feather would you hear the landing

latest.title: Mushrooms bleed when you cut them
latest.script_key: they bleed when you cut them that pink juice isn t water it s pigment and enzymes fighting to protect the mushroom that s why some turn brown fast ever sliced one and saw red that s its immune system screaming what color s yours

latest.title: Kittens aren't playing when they stalk rocks
latest.script_key: they look cute but they re practicing notice how they freeze mid pounce that s their ambush trick their claws grip rock like a knife so they can drop straight on prey that s why they act like it s play it s survival training ever see a kitten do this in your house what would you call this game

latest.title: Beetles drink through their butts
latest.script_key: beetles drink through their butts watch see that tiny leg drip their rear end slurps water straight up because their body s upside down on that leaf that s why they can drink while upside down even from a puddle thinner than a hair did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Seals track fish trails with whiskers
latest.script_key: seals can follow wakes with their whiskers watch the whiskers near the water because seals can sense tiny trails left by moving fish those vibrations help them hunt even when the water is dark or messy the face becomes a current detector which ocean sense next

latest.title: Coral reefs are built by tiny living builders
latest.script_key: coral reefs are built by tiny living builders watch the reef texture because coral animals build hard skeletons that stack into habitat fish algae and countless small creatures then use that structure like a city the color sits on top of engineering which habitat next

latest.title: Storm clouds reveal a storm's heat engine
latest.script_key: storm clouds show where a storm is feeding watch the spiral shape because warm ocean air rises near the center and releases heat as clouds build rotation organizes that energy into bands from above the storm is not random it is an engine which satellite clue next

latest.title: Fossils turn old bones into time clues
latest.script_key: fossils can preserve a clue from deep time watch the shape in the rock because fossils form when buried remains leave mineral records behind the original body is gone but the pattern can reveal age habitat and behavior which ancient clue should we read next

latest.title: Cats use grooming to reset their scent map
latest.script_key: cats use grooming to reset their scent map watch the tongue and paw movements because grooming spreads familiar scent across the coat that can help a cat settle after a tense moment and keep the fur ready for the next move the cleanup is also a signal which pet behavior should we decode next

latest.title: Beetles taste with their feet on flowers

latest.title: Lions have dark ear marks cubs can follow
